titleStmt.title: SII 16.185: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswami and G. S. Gai
No. 185. (A.R. No. 406 of 1926.) PALUGURĀḶḶAPALLE, BADVEL TALUK, CUDDAPAH DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab set up in front of the Durga temple.
This is dated Śaka 1475 (current), Paridhāvin, Āśvija śu. 10, corresponding to 1552 A.D., September 27.

The inscription records the income from the mahārachaprayōjanam and dēvatāprayōjanam of the village Peddakōḍūru and the villages included in it to the goddess Aṁkāḷa-Paramēśvari of Pedakōḍūru by Jaṁgam Sarva[yya], son of Vīraṇāla Basuvayya at the instance of and for the merit of Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Varadarājula Avubhaḷēśvaradēva Mahārāja for performing the tīrtham, parapu and siddhayōgam of the deity. The grant is said to have been made on the occasion of a lunar eclipse which was probably the one that occured on the full moon day of the preceeding Śrāvaṇa corresponding to August 5.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . svasti śrījayā
bhyudaya śālivāhanaśaka
varṣaṁbulu 1475 Agu
nēṭi paridhāvi saṁvatsara Āśvija śuddha 10
śrīmadrājādhirāja rājaparamēśva
ra śrīvīrapratāpa śrīsadāśivadēvamahā
rāyalu vijayanagaramaṁdu vajrasiṁhvā
sanārū(ṁ)ḍulai pṛthivi sakalasāmrājyaṁ śēyucu
nuṁḍagānu Ātrēyagōtrulaina śrīmanmahāmaṁḍalēśva
ḍala varadarājula Avubhaḷēśvaradēvamahārāju
la Ānatini vīraṇāla basvayya koḍuku jaṁgaṁ sarvayya
pedakōḍūri Aṁkāḷaparamēśvariki Iccina dharmmaśā
sanakramameṭlannanu pedakoḍūru Aṁdukucellē pallelu sahā
gānu mahārācadēvatāprayōjanālaku vaccēṭi kāni
ke kappālu dēvuniki vaccē Aṁttavaṭuṁnnu dēvara tīrthaṁ
parapu siddhayōgaṁ sāgē Aṁdukugānu Avubhaḷēśva
radēvamahārājulavāriki puṇyamugānu sōmagra
haṇapuṇyakālamaṁdu sarvamānyamugānu dhāravōśi
yiccina dharmaśāsanamu pedakōḍūri Aṁkāladēviki Iccina
dharmaśāsanamu Ī dharmaśāsanānaku tappi parapu siddhayōgālu tī
rthaṁ sāgakuṁḍānu carici Īkānikeku yavvaru Āsiṁciri vāru gaṁ
ggakarata gōvu jaṁpinavāru brāhmani jaṁppina pāpāna pōvuvā
ru śunakamāṁsamu surāpānamu sēviṁccinavāru yīdharma
śāsanānaku yavvaru tappinānu paṁbbināyaniki dārava
ṭṭapuvāniki tama mānāṁ Iccinavāru Iṭani vēyiṁccina
dharmaśāsanaṁ maṁgaḷamahāśrīśrīṁ jēyunū .
Digital edition of SII 16.185 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
